reviews.comment:
Un muy buen lugar para hacer un alto en el camino, se come muy bien, tienen quesos muy buenos y la atención es excelente

(Translated by Google)
A great place to stop along the way, the food is excellent, they have very good cheeses and the service is outstanding

Clean bathrooms! And a varied buffet

reviews.comment:
Aceptable los baños. Precios del minisuper...agarrate!! Te liquidan!!! He comprado galletitas a mitad de precio en la Costa comparado con los precios de ahí!!!

(Translated by Google)
The bathrooms are acceptable. Prices at the mini-market...brace yourself!! They'll rip you off!!! I've bought cookies for half price on the coast compared to their prices there!!!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChRDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCaXZ3ZBAB

reviews.comment:
Buen lugar lastima q por alguna razón mágica la tarjeta de ypf en ruta no anda nunca.  Raro

(Translated by Google)
Nice place, too bad that for some magical reason the YPF card on the road never works. Weird.

reviews.comment:
Rico. Faltaba personal para la demanda del mícro

(Translated by Google)
Rich. There was not enough staff to meet the demand for the bus.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCOUxITEhnEAE

reviews.comment:
Pase en varias oportunidades, es última vi que habían reformado el local, quedo mas amplio y luminoso, pero me decepcionó la atecion y la comida, la milanesa era una feta de carne con pan rallado, los fideos una maraña y todos pegados incomible, cosa que en otro viajes que realice no era asi, una lástima.

(Translated by Google)
I passed by several times; the last time I saw that they had renovated the place. It was more spacious and bright, but I was disappointed by the service and the food. The milanesa was a slice of meat with breadcrumbs, the noodles were a tangled mess and all stuck together, inedible, which wasn't the case on other trips I made. A shame.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCdE9fb0dREAE
